settings.heading: Award Night Trophies & Recognition
settings.subheading: Make your award night memorable with co-ordinated, branded trophies for every category — crystal, metal and acrylic, engraved with winners and your logo. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: For an award night, use a co-ordinated set of branded trophies across every category — crystal, metal or acrylic, engraved with winners and your logo, from around ₹350. Meru Trophy designs the full set with one GST invoice. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252. See our awards-night package.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: An award night looks intentional when every trophy shares one design language and your branding. We co-ordinate the full category set — headline awards, category winners and special recognitions — engraved with winners and your logo, boxed and labelled for the stage. For corporates, our awards-night package handles it end to end.

settings.title: Co-ordinated set
settings.text: One design language across all categories.

settings.question: How do I make an award night look co-ordinated?
settings.answer: Use one design family and consistent branding across every category — exactly what our co-ordinated sets do.

settings.question: Can you brand every trophy with our logo?
Do you handle corporate award nights end to end?
Will it arrive in time?
settings.answer: Yes — order 1–2 weeks ahead; we plan dispatch to your date.

settings.heading: Planning an award night?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
